author: GotSaeng OS contributors
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Compile local Markdown vault context into GotSaeng OS context packs.

manifest.author: GotSaeng OS contributors
manifest.description: Compile local Markdown vault context into GotSaeng OS context packs.
manifest.name: GotSaeng OS

name: GotSaeng OS

releases.author: wonkwonlee
releases.description:
## GotSaeng OS 0.10.5

- `ignoreGlobs` compile option: the plugin's visible output folder is no longer re-scanned on the next compile (no more `Missing updated field` warnings or inflated counts). (#6)
- Register caps: inferred bullet extraction under a heading is bounded, and every dedicated register (Risk Register, Action Backlog, Open Questions, Memory Snapshot lists) caps each list at 200 items — explicit markers kept first, remainder summarized. Output is unchanged for vaults within the cap. (#7)
- Truncated item text (>360 chars) now records a confidence warning with the source path and original length instead of failing silently. (#3)

No telemetry, network, or LLM calls; local-only behavior unchanged.

releases.author: wonkwonlee
releases.description:
## GotSaeng OS 0.10.4

Obsidian community directory review fixes:

- Removed the plugin-name heading from the settings tab (directory guideline).
- `manifest.json` `authorUrl` now points to the maintainer profile.

No other behavior changes.

### Install
```bash
npx -y @gotsaeng/cli@0.10.4 compile <vault> --output <dir> --project "<name>"
```

Obsidian plugin assets (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`) attached.

releases.author: wonkwonlee
releases.description:
## GotSaeng OS 0.10.3

Obsidian community directory compliance release:

- Root-level `manifest.json` and `versions.json` copies (the directory validates the manifest at the repository root of the release tag commit).
- Settings tab heading now uses the `Setting(containerEl).setHeading()` API instead of a raw HTML heading.
- Includes the numbered task list extraction fix contributed in #8 — thanks @MFA-G!

### Install
```bash
npx -y @gotsaeng/cli@0.10.3 compile <vault> --output <dir> --project "<name>"
```

Obsidian plugin assets (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`) attached.

releases.author: wonkwonlee
releases.description:
## GotSaeng OS 0.10.2

Fixes the Obsidian plugin **Custom path** output folder setting: the path field no longer loses focus on every keystroke, validation notices fire on blur instead of per character, and the field auto-focuses when Custom path is selected.

No compiler behavior changes.

### Install
```bash
npx -y @gotsaeng/cli@0.10.2 compile <vault> --output <dir> --project "<name>"
```

Obsidian plugin assets (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`) attached for the community plugin directory.

releases.author: wonkwonlee
releases.description:
## GotSaeng OS 0.10.1

Open-source ignition release. Local-first context compiler for Markdown vaults — no cloud, no telemetry, no LLM calls.

### Install

```bash
npx -y @gotsaeng/cli@0.10.1 compile <vault> --output <dir> --project "<name>"
```

### Highlights

- npx quick start, badges, and terminal demo in the README
- OIDC trusted-publisher release automation (npm provenance, core→cli order)
- Node 20 + 22 CI matrix and coverage tooling
- Deepened CONTRIBUTING with repo map and extension walkthroughs
- Obsidian community plugin submission package
- `@gotsaeng/shared` marked private

### Obsidian plugin assets

`main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` are attached for the Obsidian community plugin directory (desktop-only; the plugin bundles @gotsaeng/core which uses Node fs for local vault access).

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/wonkwonlee/gotsaeng-os/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.
